verse.verse_2: Wa iy yarau āyatay yu‘riḍū wa yaqūlū siḥrum mustamirr(un).
verse.verse_3: Wa każżabū wattaba‘ū ahwā'ahum wa kullu amrim mustaqirr(un).
verse.verse_4: Wa laqad jā'ahum minal-ambā'i mā fīhi muzdajar(un).
verse.verse_6: Fa tawalla ‘anhum, yauma yad‘ud-dā‘i ilā syai'in nukur(in).
verse.verse_7: Khusysya‘an abṣāruhum yakhrujūna minal-ajdāṡi ka'annahum jarādum muntasyir(un).
verse.verse_9: Każżabat qablahum qaumu nūḥin fakażżabū ‘abdanā wa qālū majnūnuw wazdujir(a).
verse.verse_10: Fa da‘ā rabbahū annī maglūbun fantaṣir.
verse.verse_12: Wa fajjarnal-arḍa ‘uyūnan faltaqal-mā'u ‘alā amrin qad qudir(a).
verse.verse_13: Wa ḥamalnāhu ‘alā żāti alwāḥiw wa dusur(in).
verse.verse_14: Tajrī bi'a‘yuninā, jazā'al liman kāna kufir(a).
verse.verse_15: Wa laqat taraknāhā āyatan fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_17: Wa laqad yassarnal-qur'āna liż-żikri fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_18: Każżabat ‘ādun fa kaifa kāna ‘ażābī wa nużur(i).
verse.verse_19: Innā arsalnā ‘alaihim rīḥan ṣarṣaran fī yaumi naḥsim mustamirr(in).
verse.verse_22: Wa laqad yassarnal-qur'āna liż-żikri fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_24: Fa qālū abasyaram minnā wāḥidan nattabi‘uh(ū), innā iżal lafī ḍalāliw wa su‘ur(in).
verse.verse_25: A'ulqiyaż-żikru ‘alaihi mim baininā bal huwa każżābun asyir(un).
verse.verse_27: Innā mursilun-nāqati fitnatal lahum fartaqibhum waṣṭabir.
verse.verse_28: Wa nabbi'hum annal-mā'a qismatum bainahum, kullu syirbim muḥtaḍar(un).
verse.verse_29: Fa nādau ṣāḥibahum fa ta‘āṭā fa ‘aqar(a).
verse.verse_31: Innā arsalnā ‘alaihim ṣaiḥataw wāḥidatan fa kānū kahasyīmil-muḥtaẓir(i).
verse.verse_32: Wa laqad yassarnal-qur'āna liż-żikri fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_34: Innā arsalnā ‘alaihim ḥāṣiban illā āla lūṭ(in), najjaināhum bisaḥar(in).
verse.verse_35: Ni‘matam min ‘indinā, każālika najzī man syakar(a).
verse.verse_36: Wa laqad anżarahum baṭsyatanā fa tamārau bin-nużur(i).
verse.verse_37: Wa laqad rāwadūhu ‘an ḍaifihī fa ṭamasnā a‘yunahum fa żūqū ‘ażābī wa nużur(i).
verse.verse_40: Wa laqad yassarnal-qur'āna liż-żikri fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_42: Każżabū bi'āyātinā kullihā fa'akhażnāhum akhża ‘azīzim muqtadir(in).
verse.verse_43: Akuffārukum khairum min ulā'ikum am lakum barā'atun fiz-zubur(i).
verse.verse_46: Balis-sā‘atu mau‘iduhum was-sā‘atu adhā wa amarr(u).
verse.verse_48: Yauma yusḥabūna fin-nāri ‘alā wujūhihim, żūqū massa saqar(a).
verse.verse_50: Wa mā amrunā illā wāḥidatun kalamḥim bil-baṣar(i).
verse.verse_51: Wa laqad ahlaknā asy-yā‘akum fahal mim muddakir(in).
verse.verse_53: Wa kullu ṣagīriw wa kabīrim mustaṭar(un).
